name: Summer Beach Food & Drink — Cozy Pixel Art Props
description:
Cool off with tropical treats! This pack serves up refreshing summer delights from creamy ice cream to ice-cold lemonade.

✨ **Includes:**
• 8 unique food & drink sprites (32×32)
• PICO-8 inspired palette with bright appetizing colors
• Full sprite sheet strip
• CC0 license — use in any project

**Perfect for:** Cafe sims, beach resorts, picnic scenes, food stalls, and any game that needs a taste of summer.
**Quality Score:** 8.1/10 — Curator Approved with Distinction
